hero.headline: Designs That Make Your Brand Unforgettable
hero.subheadline: Transforming your vision into stunning logos, brand identities and visuals that convert.

about.title: Hi, I'm abdullah
about.description: A Gen Alpha designer focused on simple, clear, and effective visuals. I specialize in creating brand identities and visual solutions that communicate your message with clarity and impact.
about.detailedDescription: From startups to established brands, I've helped 20+ clients transform their vision into captivating designs that drive results. Currently working with Tech Talkss as a Graphic Designer, crafting compelling visual narratives that elevate their brand presence. My approach combines strategic thinking with creative excellence to deliver designs that achieve your business objectives.

services.title: Logo Design
services.description: Unique, memorable logos that capture your brand essence and leave a lasting impression.

services.title: Banner Design
services.description: Eye-catching banner designs for websites, social media, and promotional campaigns.

services.title: Thumbnail Design
services.description: Compelling video thumbnails designed to maximize click-through rates and engagement.

services.title: Print Design
services.description: Professional print materials including brochures, flyers, posters, and marketing collateral.

services.title: Gig Design
services.description: Customized designs tailored for freelance gigs and specialized project requirements.

services.title: Social Media Post Design
services.description: Engaging posts, stories, ads, and graphics optimized for all social media platforms.

benefits.title: Fast Turnaround
benefits.description: Quick delivery without compromising on quality. Most projects completed within days.

benefits.title: Unlimited Revisions
benefits.description: I work until you're 100% satisfied. Your satisfaction is my priority.

benefits.title: Direct Communication
benefits.description: Work directly with me. No middlemen. Just clear, honest collaboration.

benefits.title: Premium Quality
benefits.description: High-resolution files, print-ready formats, with attention to every detail.

benefits.title: Fresh & Modern
benefits.description: Designs that follow current trends while maintaining timeless appeal.

benefits.title: Passion-Driven
benefits.description: I genuinely care about your success and pour creativity into every project.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: We discuss your brand, goals, target audience, and design preferences.

process.title: Concept
process.description: I research, brainstorm, and develop initial design concepts based on your brief.

process.title: Design & Refine
process.description: We design and refine. You review and provide feedback until it's perfect.

process.title: Delivery
process.description: You receive all final files in multiple formats ready for use.

testimonials.name: Ghufran Ilias

testimonials.name: Muhammad Azhar
testimonials.text: Amazing designer with great understanding of branding and visuals.

testimonials.name: Ali Usman
testimonials.text: Fresh and stunning designs every time. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Emma Davis
testimonials.text: Outstanding service and creative work. Delivered beyond expectations.

testimonials.name: Hamza Ahmed
testimonials.text: Professional, fast, and very creative. Loved working together.

footer.description: A Gen Alpha designer creating unforgettable brand experiences with clean, effective visuals.
